_instructions: HOW TO EDIT THIS FILE — Each entry below is one organization card in the Network grid. To ADD a placement: copy one block from { to }, paste it after the last }, put a comma between them, and fill in orgName, alt, and logo. For LOGO: save the logo file to public/network-logos/ and set 'logo' to '/network-logos/filename.svg' (or .png). If you do not have a logo yet, set 'logo' to null and the site will show a placeholder. To REMOVE an entry: delete its entire block (from { to }) and the comma before it.
